title: Superior 32oz Food Containers With Lids – 20-Pack Durable Crack-Resistant Clear Round Deli Containers With Lids -Microwave Safe Leak-Proof Meal Prep Containers - Perfect for Food Storage
features: Crack-Resistant & Durable: Say goodbye to flimsy tupperware that breaks easily. Our soup freezer containers are made from sturdy, crack-resistant materials designed to handle daily use without splitting or leaking

Easy-to-Remove Lids: No more struggling with tight or flimsy lids; these small containers with lids come with easy-to-remove, secure-fitting lids that ensure your food stays fresh in food storage containers without the hassle of prying them open

Microwave & Dishwasher Safe: Conveniently heat your meals in the microwave without worrying about warping, and clean up these reusable soup containers for freezing quickly with dishwasher-safe materials that stand up to frequent use

Optimal Capacity: Each stackable small pots with lids holds 32oz, making them perfect for portion control, meal prepping, and leftovers. Whether you’re storing soups, salads, or pasta, these containers are versatile enough for all your needs

Effortless Storage: With 20 round tupperware sets with lids in every pack, you’ll always have a reliable food storage solution at hand. Great for batch cooking, takeaway, or food delivery without the fear of breakage
